=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/processEnvInEffect.ts(7,10): warning TS377077: This Effect code reads from `process.env`, environment configuration in Effect code is represented through `Config` from Effect. effect(processEnvInEffect)
/.src/processEnvInEffect.ts(12,10): warning TS377077: This Effect code reads from `process.env`, environment configuration in Effect code is represented through `Config` from Effect. effect(processEnvInEffect)


==== /.src/processEnvInEffect.ts (2 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics processEnvInEffect:warning
    /// <reference types="node" />
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    // Should trigger - process.env directly inside Effect.gen
    export const envInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
      return process.env.SECRET
             ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377077: This Effect code reads from `process.env`, environment configuration in Effect code is represented through `Config` from Effect. effect(processEnvInEffect)
    })
    
    // Should trigger - bracket access inside Effect.fn
    export const envInFn = Effect.fn("envInFn")(function*() {
      return process.env["API_KEY"]
             ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377077: This Effect code reads from `process.env`, environment configuration in Effect code is represented through `Config` from Effect. effect(processEnvInEffect)
    })
    
    // Should NOT trigger - process.env at module level
    export const moduleEnv = process.env.PORT
    
    // Should NOT trigger - process.env in regular function
    export const regularEnv = () => process.env["HOST"]
    
    // Should NOT trigger - process.env inside nested arrow in generator
    export const nestedArrowInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const fn = () => process.env.NODE_ENV
      return fn
    })
